money_flow_summary: Money flows from buyers/renters through agents (2.5–3% commission), property managers (8–12% of rent), title companies, and mortgage lenders. AI compresses 30-day transaction cycles and automates tasks that required licensed professionals.

opportunities.title: AI Property Management Communication Agent
opportunities.how_money_is_made: AI agent handles 90% of tenant communication: maintenance requests, lease renewals, rent reminders, move-in/out coordination. Charge $29–$99/door/mo. Small landlords (5–50 units) are the most underserved.
opportunities.moat: Property and tenant data creates stickiness; vendor network integration deepens value
opportunities.first_step: Build SMS/email AI responder using Twilio + Claude; create maintenance request triage; offer free 90-day trial to 10 landlords via BiggerPockets
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI handles every tenant message 24/7 — responding to 11pm 'heat not working' messages and creating work orders automatically

competitors.name: Buildium
competitors.weakness: Property management platform, not AI communication; $55–$460+/mo; still requires human to respond to tenant messages

competitors.name: AppFolio
competitors.weakness: $1.40/unit/mo minimum; AI-lite (just canned responses); no true autonomous communication

competitors.name: Hemlane
competitors.weakness: Human-hybrid model; $2–$28/unit/mo; real humans handle responses, not automated

opportunities.gap: Every property management tool has a tenant portal but requires a human to respond. An AI that autonomously handles maintenance triaging, vendor coordination, and tenant communication without human intervention is absent.
poc_steps: Create a Twilio number ($1/mo) with a Claude-powered auto-responder
Forward a landlord friend's rental inquiries to your number for 1 week
Show them: 'AI responded to 34 tenant messages, created 6 work orders, scheduled 2 viewings — automatically'

opportunities.title: Real Estate Listing Copy & Marketing Automation
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Takes MLS data + photos, generates: compelling listing description, social media posts for Instagram/Facebook, email campaign for buyer database, property website. Charge agents $49–$199/listing or $99/mo subscription.
opportunities.moat: Agent's past listing style trains personalized voice; MLS integration creates workflow embedding
opportunities.first_step: Build MLS data input form + Claude listing generator; offer first 3 listings free; post in real estate Facebook groups
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates emotionally resonant copy that highlights right features for neighborhood's buyer demographic

competitors.name: Canva (templates)
competitors.weakness: Design tool only; no AI copy; no MLS integration; manual

competitors.name: Zillow agent tools
competitors.weakness: Portal-locked; no content generation; no social media integration

competitors.name: ListingAI
competitors.weakness: Basic description generator; no full marketing suite; no social scheduling; $29/mo for minimal features

opportunities.gap: ListingAI does basic descriptions but doesn't produce the full marketing package (social posts + email campaign + property website) from one MLS import. That full automation is the gap.
poc_steps: Find any Zillow listing with photo URLs and MLS data
Prompt Claude: 'write a compelling listing description + 3 Instagram captions for this property'
Demo to 5 real estate agents — offer first 3 listings free
